jobs.title: Store Maintenance Helpdesk Coordinator
jobs.description:
Michael Kors is always interested in hearing from talented, globally-minded individuals with a passion for fashion.

If you enjoy working in a creative, fast-paced environment, then we would love to hear from you!

—
Job Title: Store Maintenance Helpdesk Coordinator
Location: Manno, Switzerland
Reporting to: Senior Manager, Store Maintenance

Job Purpose:
The Store Maintenance Helpdesk role acts as the first point of contact for all stores and internal departments interacting with the Store Maintenance team.
The position is responsible for receiving, checking, and routing all maintenance requests submitted through the FM ticketing system, ensuring a first level quality control, correct prioritization, and proper assignment before escalation to technical teams.

Key Responsibilities:
Helpdesk & First Level Support
Serve as the primary contact for:
Retail stores
Concessions, Wholesale and Travel Retail
Internal departments (Operations, Retail, Visual, H&S, etc.)
Provide first level support for maintenance requests, clarifying procedures and guiding users on correct ticket submission.
Handle incoming requests in a structured, service oriented, and solution focused manner.

Ticket Management & First Review
Monitor and manage all tickets opened in the Facility Management system.
Perform an initial quality check on each ticket, ensuring:
Clear and complete issue description
Correct categorization and priority
Required photos or documentation attached
Identify and flag urgent or Health & Safety–critical issues according to internal guidelines.
Assign tickets to the appropriate internal teams or vendors based on:
Type of issue
Priority level
Store location / country

Coordination & Follow Up
Ensure correct ticket ownership and handover to Store Maintenance teams.
Support the FM team with first level follow ups and status monitoring.
Communicate with stores when additional information is required.
Determine the nature and urgency of the repair problem and report the problem to the appropriate vendor
Maintain service records database for all store locations
Communicate progress of repairs on a regular basis by issuing weekly/monthly progress updates
Review and approve invoices and maintain accurate reporting to the F&M Manager
Controls the maintenance calendar for all domestic retail, establishing job priorities and time frames
Coordination of helpdesk team ensuring all the relevant request have been addressed properly/ facilities database management.
Ensure follow up and updates of tasks in the system to the relevant country manager
Keep track and update all the facilities department files providing evidence monthly basis
Maintaining records and contracts updated of all the external contractors in support of the FM department.
Support in creation of facilities and maintenance policy and process keeping them updated.
Occasional front desk support during receptionist absence
Keep all communication and actions properly tracked within the system
Any other administrative duty

Process & Data Quality Support
Contribute to maintaining high data quality standards within the ticketing platform.
Support continuous improvement of helpdesk and ticketing processes.
Identify recurring issues, incorrect submissions, or training needs for stores.
Assist with basic reporting and operational data collection when required.

Key Skills & Competencies: 
Strong service and helpdesk mindset
Ability to prioritize and manage multiple requests
High attention to detail and structured working approach
Clear and professional communication skills
Problem solving attitude
Confidence using ticketing systems and digital platforms
Ability to work closely with technical and operational teams

Nice to Have
Previous experience in Helpdesk, Facility Management, or Retail Operations
Familiarity with retail maintenance processes
Awareness of Health & Safety principles

MK Perks:
Our purpose is to make all employees and customers #FeelGreat with Michael Kors. When you join our business, we want you to feel like a valued member of the team from Day 1. To make your journey enriching with us, we offer:
Cross-brand Discount
Exclusive Employee Sales
Paid Parental Leave
Generous Holiday Schedule and Vacation Days
Summer Fridays
Internal mobility across Capri Brands (Michael Kors, Jimmy Choo)
Flexible working hours
Thrive Wellness Program
LifeWorks Employee Assistance Program
#FeelGreat program that include the following pillars: Connected Communities/Inspired Innovation/ Responsible Future/Meaningful Experiences

descriptionByLocale.it: Michael Kors è sempre interessato a sentire da individui di talento, di mentalità globale con una passione per la moda. Se vi piace lavorare in un ambiente creativo e veloce, allora ci piacerebbe sentire da voi! ## Descrizione Titolo del lavoro: Store Maintenance Helpdesk Coordinator Location: Manno, Switzerland Reporting to: Senior Manager, Store Maintenance ## Job Scopo Il ruolo di Store Maintenance Helpdesk funge da primo punto di contatto per tutti i negozi e i dipartimenti interni che interagiscono con il team Store Maintenance. La posizione è responsabile per la ricezione, il controllo e l'instradamento di tutte le richieste di manutenzione presentate attraverso il sistema di ticketing FM, assicurando un controllo di qualità di primo livello, una corretta prioritizzazione e una corretta assegnazione prima dell'escalation ai team tecnici. ## Responsabilità chiave Helpdesk & First Level Support Servire come contatto principale per: - Negozi al dettaglio - Concessioni, Commercio all'ingrosso e Travel Retail - Dipartimenti interni (Operazioni, Retail, Visual, H&S, ecc.) - Fornire supporto di primo livello per le richieste di manutenzione, chiarire le procedure e guidare gli utenti sulla corretta presentazione dei biglietti. - Maneggiare le richieste in arrivo in modo strutturato, orientato al servizio e orientato alla soluzione. Ticket Management & First Review - Monitorare e gestire tutti i biglietti aperti nel sistema Facility Management. - Eseguire un controllo di qualità iniziale su ogni biglietto, assicurando: - Descrizione di emissione chiara e completa - Corretta categorizzazione e priorità - Foto richieste o documentazione allegata - Identificare e contrassegnare questioni urgenti o di sicurezza-critiche secondo le linee guida interne. - Assegnare i biglietti per le squadre interne appropriate o i fornitori in base a: - Tipo di emissione - Livello prioritario - Luogo di deposito / Paese Coordination & Follow Up - Assicurare la corretta proprietà dei biglietti e la consegna ai team di Manutenzione Store. - Supporta il team FM con follow up di primo livello e monitoraggio dello stato. - Comunicare con i negozi quando sono richieste ulteriori informazioni. - Determinare la natura e l'urgenza del problema di riparazione e segnalare il problema al fornitore appropriato - Mantenere database di registri di servizio per tutte le sedi di negozio - Comunicare il progresso delle riparazioni su base regolare emettendo aggiornamenti settimanali / mensili di progresso - Review e approvare fatture e mantenere la segnalazione accurata al gestore F&M - Controlla il calendario di manutenzione per tutte le vendite domestiche, stabilire priorità di lavoro e tempi - Coordinamento del team di helpdesk che assicurano tutte le relative richieste. - Assicurare il follow-up e gli aggiornamenti delle attività nel sistema al responsabile del paese pertinente - Tenere traccia e aggiornare tutti i file di reparto strutture che forniscono prove mensili - Mantenere record e contratti aggiornati di tutti gli appaltatori esterni a supporto del dipartimento FM. - Supporto nella creazione di strutture e politica di manutenzione e processo mantenendoli aggiornati. - Supporto reception occasionale durante l'assenza di receptionist - Mantenere tutte le comunicazioni e le azioni correttamente tracciate all'interno del sistema - Qualsiasi altro dovere amministrativo Process & Data Quality Support - Contribuire a mantenere elevati standard di qualità dei dati all'interno della piattaforma di ticketing. - Supporto continuo miglioramento dei processi di helpdesk e ticketing. - Identificare i problemi ricorrenti, le osservazioni errate o le esigenze di formazione per i negozi. - Assistere con report di base e raccolta dati operativi quando necessario. ## Key Skills & Competencies - Forte servizio e helpdesk mindset - Capacità di priorità e gestire più richieste - Alta attenzione ai dettagli e approccio di lavoro strutturato - Capacità di comunicazione chiara e professionale - Problem solving atteggiamento - Confidenza utilizzando sistemi di ticketing e piattaforme digitali - Capacità di lavorare a stretto contatto con i team tecnici e operativi ## Nice to Have - Esperienza precedente in Helpdesk, Facility Management, o Retail Operations Quando ti unisci alla nostra attività, vogliamo che ti senta come un membro apprezzato della squadra dal Giorno 1. Per rendere il vostro viaggio arricchente con noi, offriamo: - Sconto del marchio - Esclusive vendite del dipendente - Paid Parental Leave - Generoso programma di vacanza e giorni di vacanza - Venerdì estivo - mobilità interna attraverso i marchi di Capri (Michael Kors, Jimmy Choo) - Ore lavorative flessibili - Programma di benessere trascendente - LifeWorks Employee Assistance Program - #Feel Kors, Jimmy Choo) - Programma di sostegno futuro: Connected A Capri, siamo tutti responsabili della creazione di un luogo di lavoro vario e inclusivo. Cerchiamo di ispirare il cambiamento e la crescita l'uno all'altro e crediamo che il successo sia un risultato che deriva dalle nostre differenze. Capri è orgogliosa di essere un datore di lavoro pari opportunità impegnata a inclusionvity indipendentemente da età, sesso, orientamento sessuale, identità di genere, caratteristiche genetiche, razza, colore, credo, religione, etnia, origine nazionale, alienazione, cittadinanza, disabilità, stato civile, stato militare, gravidanza, o qualsiasi altra base protetta legalmente riconosciuta vietata dalla legge applicabile. M/D/F/V La Società è un datore di lavoro pari opportunità. La politica della Società non è di discriminare illegalmente contro qualsiasi candidato o dipendente sulla base di razza, colore, sesso, orientamento sessuale, identità di genere, religione, origine nazionale, età, stato militare, disabilità, informazioni genetiche o qualsiasi altra considerazione resa illecita dalle leggi federali, statali o locali applicabili. La Società vieta anche le molestie di richiedenti e dipendenti in base a una di queste categorie protette. ## Contatto At Capri Holdings Limited, ci impegniamo a fornire un processo di reclutamento equo e accessibile. Se avete bisogno di un alloggio ragionevole per l'intervista o il processo di applicazione, si prega di contattare il nostro team Talent Acquisition a CapriTalentAcquisition@CapriHoldings.com.

Stellenbeschreibung: Store Maintenance Helpdesk Koordinator Standort: Manno, Schweiz Bericht an: Senior Manager, Store Maintenance oder Job Purpose Die Store Maintenance Helpdesk-Rolle fungiert als erster Ansprechpartner für alle Geschäfte und internen Abteilungen, die mit dem Store Maintenance-Team interagieren. Die Position ist verantwortlich für den Empfang, die Überprüfung und das Routing aller durch das FM-Ticketing-System eingereichten Wartungsanfragen, um eine erstklassige Qualitätskontrolle, eine korrekte Priorisierung und eine ordnungsgemäße Zuordnung vor der Eskalation an technische Teams zu gewährleisten. Schlüsselantworten Helpdesk & First Level Support Als primärer Ansprechpartner für: - Einzelhandelsgeschäfte -Konzessionen, Groß- und Reiseeinzelhandel - Interne Abteilungen (Operationen, Einzelhandel, Visual, H&S usw.) - Erste Unterstützung für Wartungsanfragen, Klärungsverfahren und Anleitung der Nutzer bei korrekter Ticketeinreichung. - Geben Sie eingehende Anfragen in strukturierter, serviceorientierter und lösungsorientierter Weise aus. Ticket Management & First Review - Überwachen und verwalten Sie alle im Facility Management System eröffneten Tickets. - Führen Sie eine erste Qualitätskontrolle auf jedem Ticket durch, um sicherzustellen: - Klare und vollständige Ausgabebeschreibung - Korrekte Kategorisierung und Priorität - Benötigte Fotos oder Unterlagen beigefügt - Identifizierung und Flagge dringende oder Gesundheits- und Sicherheitskritische Fragen nach internen Richtlinien. - Tickets den entsprechenden internen Teams oder Anbietern zuweisen, basierend auf: - Art der Ausgabe - Prioritätsstufe - Speicherort / Länderkoordination & Follow Up - Stellen Sie sicher, dass die Kartenbesitzer und Übergabe an Store Maintenance-Teams korrekt sind. - Unterstützung des FM-Teams mit ersten Level-Nachfolgen und Statusüberwachung. - Kommunizieren Sie mit Geschäften, wenn zusätzliche Informationen erforderlich sind. - Bestimmen Sie die Art und Dringlichkeit des Reparaturproblems und melden Sie das Problem an den zuständigen Anbieter - Bewahren Sie die Datenbank der Service-Aufzeichnungen für alle Filialstellen - Kommunizieren Sie regelmäßig den Fortschritt der Reparaturen durch die Ausgabe von wöchentlichen/monatlichen Fortschrittsaktualisierungen - Überprüfen und billigen Sie Rechnungen und halten Sie genaue Berichterstattung an den F&M-Manager - Kontrolliert den Wartungskalender für alle Inlandskunden, Festlegung von Stellenprioritäten und Zeitrahmen - Koordination von Helpdesk-Teams-Teams korrektemitteilungen und Unterstützung für alle relevanten Datenbanken. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass die Aufgaben im System an den zuständigen Landmanager weitergeführt und aktualisiert werden - Halten Sie alle Anlageabteilungsdateien, die monatliche Beweise liefern - Aufrechterhaltung von Datensätzen und Verträgen aktualisiert von allen externen Vertragspartnern zur Unterstützung der FM-Abteilung. - Unterstützung bei der Schaffung von Einrichtungen und Wartungsrichtlinien und deren Aktualisierung. - Unterstützung der Rezeption während der Rezeption - Halten Sie alle Kommunikation und Aktionen ordnungsgemäß im System verfolgt - Jede andere administrative Pflicht Process & Data Quality Support - Beitrag zur Aufrechterhaltung hoher Datenqualität Standards innerhalb der Ticketing-Plattform. - Unterstützung der kontinuierlichen Verbesserung von Helpdesk und Ticketing-Prozessen. - Erkennen Sie wiederkehrende Probleme, falsche Einreichungen oder Schulungsbedarf für Läden. - Besteht bei Bedarf mit der grundlegenden Melde- und Betriebsdatenerhebung. Si vous aimez travailler dans un environnement créatif et dynamique, nous aimerions avoir de vos nouvelles ! ## Descrizione Titre du poste : Coordonnateur du service d'assistance à la maintenance du magasin Lieu : Manno, Suisse Sous la responsabilité de : Directeur principal, Maintenance du magasin ## Objectif du poste Le rôle du service d'assistance à la maintenance du magasin agit en tant que premier point de contact pour tous les magasins et services internes interagissant avec l'équipe de maintenance du magasin. Le poste est responsable de la réception, de la vérification et de l'acheminement de toutes les demandes de maintenance soumises via le système de billetterie FM, en assurant un contrôle de qualité de premier niveau, une hiérarchisation correcte et une affectation appropriée avant la remontée aux équipes techniques. ## Responsabilités clés Service d'assistance et support de premier niveau Servir de contact principal pour : - les magasins de détail - les concessions, la vente en gros et la vente au détail de voyages - les services internes (opérations, vente au détail, visuel, santé et sécurité, etc.) - Fournir un soutien de premier niveau pour les demandes de maintenance, clarifier les procédures et guider les utilisateurs sur la soumission correcte des billets. - Gérer les demandes entrantes de manière structurée, orientée service et axée sur les solutions. Gestion des tickets et premier examen - Surveillez et gérez tous les tickets ouverts dans le système de gestion des installations. - Effectuer un contrôle de qualité initial sur chaque ticket, en s'assurant : - Une description claire et complète du problème - Une catégorisation et une priorité correctes - Les photos ou la documentation requises Nous essayons d'inspirer le changement et la croissance les uns chez les autres et nous croyons que le succès est un résultat qui vient de nos différences. jobs.description:
Michael Kors is always interested in hearing from talented, globally-minded individuals with a passion for fashion.

If you enjoy working in a creative, fast-paced environment, then we would love to hear from you!

—
SALES ASSOCIATE

"I feel really lucky to be surrounded by such a great team. I’m not only grateful that they’ve helped
me achieve my goals, but also that I can give them a place where they can achieve theirs."
- Michael Kors -

Who You Are:
You bring enthusiasm for fashion and thrive in a dynamic retail environment. As a Michael Kors Ambassador,
you represent the brand’s values with professionalism and integrity. You’re committed to creating inclusive,
welcoming experiences for all customers, using strong communication, teamwork, and a proactive mindset to
navigate challenges with energy and optimism.
What You’ll Do:
 Lead by example as a MK Ambassador, ensuring exceptional customer experiences to drive loyalty and
repeat business.
 Maintain client communication using all available clientelling apps and tools.
 Maintain floor and stock presence.
 Build and maintain effective communication with the management team to drive store performance.
 Use of Product Knowledge packs to become a Selling Expert to advise our customers with passion and
confidence.
 Understand business results and opportunities to drive sales.
You’ll Need to Have:
 Excitement and enthusiasm to work in fast paced retail environment with relevant sales experience.
 Capability and desire to collaborate and inspire all fellow team players to work together to achieve
results.
 Technological proficiency, with the ability to leverage technology to drive sales and customer
experience.
 Local language preferable and effective communication skills.
What We Offer:
 Competitive compensation package
 Attractive commission scheme
 Clothing allowance

jobs.description:
Michael Kors is always interested in hearing from talented, globally-minded individuals with a passion for fashion.

If you enjoy working in a creative, fast-paced environment, then we would love to hear from you!

—
ASSISTANT STORE MANAGER

"I feel really lucky to be surrounded by such a great team. I’m not only grateful that they’ve helped
me achieve my goals, but also that I can give them a place where they can achieve theirs."
- Michael Kors -

Who You Are:
You take ownership of store operations and team leadership, working collaboratively to drive business
performance. As Assistant Store Manager, you share responsibility for building a high-performing team,
meeting operational budgets, and developing a proactive business strategy alongside the management team.
You bring strong communication skills, a collaborative mindset, and a positive, energetic approach to
challenges.
What You’ll Do:
People
 Inspire, lead, and coach the store team to foster a culture of accountability and high performance.
 Support recruitment, training, and development to build a team of dedicated Michael Kors brand
ambassadors.
Sales and Service
 Lead by example on the sales floor, driving results and holding yourself and the team accountable.
 Analyze performance reports and implement action plans to exceed expectations.
 Manage the client database proactively to enhance customer engagement and increase sales.
 Collaborate on local customer events to generate additional revenue.
 Ensure consistent client communication using all available clienteling tools.
Operations
 Maintain inventory integrity through scheduled audits and bi-annual inventories.
 Utilize company communication platforms effectively and take appropriate action on updates.
.
You’ll Need to Have:
 Proven retail and management experience in a fast-paced environment
 Strong leadership and collaboration skills
 Proficiency in leveraging technology to enhance sales and customer experience
 Ability to perform under pressure and adapt to a dynamic retail setting
 Excellent organizational, interpersonal, and follow-up skills with attention to detail
 Familiarity with retail KPIs and Microsoft Office
 Fluency in English and effective communication skill
What We Offer:
 Cross-Brand Discounts & Private Employee Sales – Enjoy exclusive savings across all Capri
brands.
 Vacation Allowance – Recharge with paid time off throughout the year.
 Internal Mobility Across Capri Brands – Explore new career paths within the broader Capri network.
 Employee Assistance Program – Confidential support for mental, emotional, and financial wellbeing.

jobs.description:
Michael Kors is always interested in hearing from talented, globally-minded individuals with a passion for fashion.

If you enjoy working in a creative, fast-paced environment, then we would love to hear from you!

—
SALES ASSOCIATE

"I feel really lucky to be surrounded by such a great team. I’m not only grateful that they’ve helped
me achieve my goals, but also that I can give them a place where they can achieve theirs."
- Michael Kors -

Who You Are:
You bring enthusiasm for fashion and thrive in a dynamic retail environment. As a Michael Kors Ambassador,
you represent the brand’s values with professionalism and integrity. You’re committed to creating inclusive,
welcoming experiences for all customers, using strong communication, teamwork, and a proactive mindset to
navigate challenges with energy and optimism.
What You’ll Do:
 Lead by example as a MK Ambassador, ensuring exceptional customer experiences to drive loyalty and
repeat business.
 Maintain client communication using all available clientelling apps and tools.
 Maintain floor and stock presence.
 Build and maintain effective communication with the management team to drive store performance.
 Use of Product Knowledge packs to become a Selling Expert to advise our customers with passion and
confidence.
 Understand business results and opportunities to drive sales.
You’ll Need to Have:
 Excitement and enthusiasm to work in fast paced retail environment with relevant sales experience.
 Capability and desire to collaborate and inspire all fellow team players to work together to achieve
results.
 Technological proficiency, with the ability to leverage technology to drive sales and customer
experience.
 Local language preferable and effective communication skills.
What We Offer:
 Competitive compensation package
 Attractive commission scheme
 Clothing allowance

jobs.description: Michael Kors is always interested in hearing from talented, globally-minded individuals with a passion for fashion. If you enjoy working in a creative, fast-paced environment, then we would love to hear from you! — MAIN JOB OBJECTIVE Achieve sales goals and develop lasting client relationships. These initiatives are achieved by providing the highest level of customer service and complying with all company policies, procedures and directives. JOB RESPONSIBILITIES The responsibilities of this role are included in 3 areas : Sales Generation - Meet sales goals - Utilize the elevated levels of sales and service to maximize sales performance - Demonstrate an in-depth knowledge of the merchandise - After closing a sale, monitor all details including: shipping, alterations (if applicable) and special requests to ensure customer satisfaction - Comply with all sales related policies and procedures - Maintain a keen interest in the fashion industry and market trends Customer service - Provide the highest level of customer service - Build and maintain repeat clientele; utilize client book - Resolve all client problems and complaints quickly and effectively, ensuring client satisfaction Operations - Keep selling floor and merchandise neat, organized and stocked - Assist in the maintenance of all inventory in the stockroom and on the selling floor - Assist in all areas of stock, shipping, receiving protocol/policies and all shipping/ receiving related paperwork. - Participate in inventories Comply with all Point-of-Sale policies and procedures Properly execute all relevant register functions - Adhere to work schedule, inclusive of time and attendance - Participate in all relevant training and development seminars, programs and meetings as directed by store management REQUIREMENTS Experience of retail and luxury Able to work as a team member Excellent personal organizational skills with attention of detail and accuracy Able to work under pressure and to thrive in a fast-paced, challenging environment Able to work on different tasks easily – Multi-tasking — The Company is an equal employment opportunity employer. The Company’s policy is not to unlawfully discriminate against any applicant or employee on the basis of race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion, national origin, age, military status, disability, genetic information or any other consideration made unlawful by applicable federal, state, or local laws. The Company also prohibits harassment of applicants and employees based on any of these protected categories. — At Capri Holdings Limited, we are committed to providing a fair and accessible recruitment process. If you require a reasonable accommodation for the interview or application process, please contact our Talent Acquisition team at CapriTalentAcquisition@CapriHoldings.com.
